meta.name: Heshan Wickramaratne
meta.title: Software Engineer
meta.description: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in full-stack development, cloud-native platforms, DevOps automation, and 3D graphics.

hero.subtitle: Software Engineer — Full Stack | Cloud | DevOps | 3D Graphics
hero.description: 5+ years designing and delivering cloud-native platforms and DevOps automation systems. Core contributor to production SaaS platforms, building scalable microservices and CI/CD-driven infrastructure.

about.title: ABOUT
bio: Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and delivering cloud-native platforms and DevOps automation systems. Core contributor to a production SaaS platform (SkyU), building scalable microservices and CI/CD-driven infrastructure using AWS, Node.js, Go, and React.

Experienced in system design, API architecture, and improving engineering efficiency through automation and cloud-native practices. Published author with research in system design and technical communication.
Beyond engineering, I'm a competitive swimmer of 19+ years, a street dancer, calisthenics artist, and pianist.

items.description: Contributed to the ongoing development and optimisation of SkyU, enhancing DevOps automation workflows and supporting client migrations to the platform. Integrated AI-driven document processing capabilities using AWS Bedrock, improving automation of document analysis within the Realtime Conveyancer product.

Core developer on SkyU, a DevOps automation platform, building production-grade microservices using Node.js, NestJS, Go, and AWS. Designed and implemented API-driven microservices using cloud-native patterns, improving system scalability, modularity, and deployment efficiency. Developed full-stack features using React and TypeScript, integrating frontend systems with backend services and CI/CD pipelines. Contributed to taking a product from concept to market within a fixed timeline.

Awarded Most Outstanding Intern (2021) for exceptional technical contribution and ownership. Contributed to full-stack development of internal systems using React, Node.js, Java, and AWS. Built and integrated features using serverless architectures. Developed interactive 3D web components using Three.js for internal applications.

achievements.title: KEY ACHIEVEMENTS
items: Core contributor to SkyU, a production DevOps automation platform, building scalable microservices and cloud-native infrastructure used to streamline CI/CD workflows for multiple clients.
Designed and implemented API-driven microservices using event-driven and serverless patterns, improving system scalability and deployment efficiency.
Built and optimised CI/CD pipelines using Docker and GitHub Actions, reducing manual deployment effort and improving release reliability.
Awarded Most Outstanding Intern (99x) for exceptional technical contribution across full-stack and cloud engineering initiatives.
Published author (Documon, ICSCCM 2023, SPIE), demonstrating strong research, system design, and technical communication skills.
Valedictorian and Gold Medallist — BSc. Software Engineering, Class of 2023.

items.notes: Student Peer Mentor and Study Buddy for Neuro Divergent Students
Valedictorian & Gold Medallist (Class of 2023) | Batch Top (2019, 2020, 2021, 2023)

contact.title: LET'S CONNECT
contact.description: Always open to new opportunities, collaborations, or a good conversation about technology, design, and engineering.
